# Hult Cohort Developer Program

> Open-source curriculum and cohort platform — GitHub-native, agent-first, Summer Pilot 2026.

## Public site

- [Home](https://site-nine-rouge-68.vercel.app/): Landing page and apply CTA
- [Program overview](https://site-nine-rouge-68.vercel.app/overview): Full participant journey
- [All projects](https://site-nine-rouge-68.vercel.app/program): Every phase and project
- [Apply](https://site-nine-rouge-68.vercel.app/apply): Summer Pilot application
- [Sitemap](https://site-nine-rouge-68.vercel.app/sitemap.xml)
- [Robots](https://site-nine-rouge-68.vercel.app/robots.txt)

## Program projects

- [Onboarding](https://site-nine-rouge-68.vercel.app/program/onboarding)
- [Project 1 — PM platform](https://site-nine-rouge-68.vercel.app/program/phase-1-project-1)
- [Project 2 — Comms](https://site-nine-rouge-68.vercel.app/program/phase-1-project-2)
- [Project 3 — Public showcase](https://site-nine-rouge-68.vercel.app/program/phase-1-project-3)
- [Phase 1 unification](https://site-nine-rouge-68.vercel.app/program/phase-1-unification)
- [Project 4 — Learning app](https://site-nine-rouge-68.vercel.app/program/phase-2-learning-app)
- [Project 5 — Venture](https://site-nine-rouge-68.vercel.app/program/phase-2-venture)
- [Project 6 — Open source](https://site-nine-rouge-68.vercel.app/program/phase-2-open-source)

## Open-source repository

- [GitHub — hult-cohort-program](https://github.com/rogerSuperBuilderAlpha/hult-cohort-program)
- [MCP server setup](https://github.com/rogerSuperBuilderAlpha/hult-cohort-program/tree/main/execution/hult-cohort-mcp): apply, reviews, votes from Cursor
- [AGENTS.md](https://github.com/rogerSuperBuilderAlpha/hult-cohort-program/blob/main/AGENTS.md): Guide for AI coding agents
- Staff scripts: `scripts/tally-votes.mjs`, `scripts/seed-demo-cohort.mjs`, `scripts/seed-peer-reviews.mjs`
- [CONTRIBUTING.md](https://github.com/rogerSuperBuilderAlpha/hult-cohort-program/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [LICENSE (MIT)](https://github.com/rogerSuperBuilderAlpha/hult-cohort-program/blob/main/LICENSE)
- [SECURITY.md](https://github.com/rogerSuperBuilderAlpha/hult-cohort-program/blob/main/SECURITY.md)
